goal: I want to become a DevOps engineer with cloud expertise

matched_occupation.label: cloud DevOps engineer
matched_occupation.description: Cloud DevOps engineers implement and manage continuous software delivery systems and methodologies. This includes managing and configuring code repositories, build services, automated testing, and deployment mechanisms. For cloud-based workloads, a Cloud DevOps Engineer define and deploy infrastructure as code, automating test and development environments. They can define and configure automated disaster recovery solutions that meet business objectives.

learning_path.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
objectives: Understand JavaScript syntax, data types, and operators.
Learn about control flow statements (if/else, loops).
Learn about the Document Object Model (DOM) and how to manipulate it.

learning_path.title: Introduction to Computer Engineering
objectives: Understand the basic components of a computer system (CPU, memory, I/O).
Learn about computer architecture and organization.
Learn about operating systems and their role.

learning_path.title: ICT System Programming Fundamentals
objectives: Understand the role of system programming in ICT.
Learn about system calls and their purpose.
Understand process management and inter-process communication.
Learn about memory management and virtual memory.
Understand file systems and I/O operations.

Logical reasoning.title: KAG (8,226 stars)
Logical reasoning.description: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs.  It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.
